analytics_dedup_source.py: Find duplicate and near-duplicate analytics content objects
analytics_extract_source.py: Extract knowledge and analytics facts from source content
analytics_reflect_knowledge.py: Reflect over analytics facts and propose metric candidates
analytics_run_diagnostic.py: Run diagnostic workflow for an analytics signal
analytics_sync_source.py: Sync analytics sources from contracts or source fixtures
migrate_legacy_analytics_control_db.py: Copy legacy analytics tables from main_vault.sqlite3 to data/db/analytics_control.sqlite3
